channel.title: Haitian Li on Tom M. Ragonneau
channel.description: Recent content in Haitian Li on Tom M. Ragonneau

item.title: Tuesday, 10 January 2023
item.description: Title: The missing semester course. Venue: Online. Notes This talk introduces the missing semester course taught at MIT. The authors focused on shell tools and scripting, the vim editor, and version control using git.
